red.name: Acute adrenal crisis— already listed as adrenal insufficiency? If not, include

yellow.name: Sinus venous thrombosis subtypes missed— added as separate consideration

Panic attack / acute anxiety disorder causing hyperventilation

red.name: Status epilepticus/postictal hyperventilation with airway compromise

yellow.name: Pulmonary edema from acute severe hypertension / hypertensive emergency
Carbon monoxide poisoning- omitted since duplicate

Sickle cell crisis with hemolysis leading to jaundice

red.name: Vertebral fractures with spinal cord compression

yellow.name: Muscle strain/ligamentous sprain of lower back

red.name: Acute intracranial infection complication: empyema/epidural abscess with mass effect

yellow.name: Acute constipation/fecal impaction causing severe pain

yellow.name: Placenta accreta spectrum— risk for severe hemorrhage
